chapter: ENG9_4 – In the Kingdom of Fools
title: In the Kingdom of Fools – Medium VSAQs

questions.question: Why did the king change night into day and day into night?
questions.answer: Because he wanted to rule differently from other kings.

questions.question: How did the people react to the king’s strange rule?
questions.answer: They obeyed the rule out of fear of punishment.

questions.question: What did the guru realise after seeing the market prices?
questions.answer: He realised the kingdom was ruled by fools.

questions.question: What warning did the guru give to his disciple?
questions.answer: He warned him that living in a kingdom of fools was dangerous.

questions.question: What made the disciple grow fat?
questions.answer: Eating cheap food like bananas, rice and ghee every day.

questions.question: Why did the thief enter the merchant’s house?
questions.answer: To steal valuables.

questions.question: Why did the merchant blame the bricklayer?
questions.answer: Because the bricklayer had built the weak wall.

questions.question: Why did the bricklayer blame the dancing girl?
questions.answer: Because her anklets distracted him while he was building the wall.

questions.question: Why did the dancing girl blame the goldsmith?
questions.answer: Because he delayed making her jewellery.

questions.question: Why did the goldsmith blame the merchant?
questions.answer: Because he was busy completing the merchant’s order.

questions.question: Why was a new stake prepared for execution?
questions.answer: To punish the supposed criminal.

questions.question: Why could the merchant not be executed?
questions.answer: Because he was too thin for the stake.

questions.question: How did the king’s servants find the disciple?
questions.answer: They searched the town for a fat man and found him.

questions.question: What did the disciple remember when he was captured?
questions.answer: The guru’s warning about the kingdom of fools.

questions.question: How did the guru know about the disciple’s problem?
questions.answer: He saw it through his magical powers.

questions.question: Why did the guru ask to be executed first?
questions.answer: To trick the king and save his disciple.

questions.question: Why did the king postpone the execution?
questions.answer: Because he wanted to think about the guru’s words.

questions.question: What secret did the guru whisper to the king?
questions.answer: That the first person to die on the stake would be reborn as king.

questions.question: Why did the king want to die first?
questions.answer: Because he wanted to be reborn as king again.

questions.question: How did the king and minister disguise themselves?
questions.answer: They dressed like the guru and disciple.

questions.question: Why did the people panic after the execution?
questions.answer: Because the king and minister were dead.

questions.question: Why did the people choose the guru as their king?
questions.answer: Because they needed wise leadership.

questions.question: Why did the disciple quickly accept the offer?
questions.answer: Because he liked the idea of becoming minister.

questions.question: What condition did the guru place before ruling?
questions.answer: He would change all the old foolish laws.

questions.question: What major change happened after the guru became king?
questions.answer: Normal day and night routines were restored.
